title: Recruitment Drive

startPoint.en: Talk to Sir Amik Varze on the 2nd floor in the White Knights' Castle in Falador.

items.name: Store all equipment and anything in your inventory to be able to start the puzzles
items.display: Store all equipment and anything in your inventory to be able to start the puzzles

recommended.name: Sir Leye
recommended.display: Being a female character to defeat Sir Leye (this is not a safe death for hardcore ironman accounts).

recommended.name: Players are highly recommended to turn into a female character in order to complete the quest without difficulty. Alternatively, players may simply home teleport out of Sir Leye's room - however this can take a long time and can happen multiple times - as home teleporting won't reset your quest progress, allowing them to finish the quest while being a male character.
recommended.display: Players are highly recommended to turn into a female character in order to complete the quest without difficulty. Alternatively, players may simply home teleport out of Sir Leye's room - however this can take a long time and can happen multiple times - as home teleporting won't reset your quest progress, allowing them to finish the quest while being a male character.

kills: Sir Leye (level 7) without weapons or armour.

rewards.name: Initiate armour
rewards.display: Access to Initiate Temple Knight armour. You will be given a helmet (Initiate sallet) for free, and you can buy subsequent helmets for 6,000 coins, the legs (Initiate cuisse) for 8,000 coins, the platebody (Initiate hauberk) for 10,000 coins, and the full set for 20,000 coins. It looks just like White armour, only with a light gold trim and a different helmet visor.

text.en: Teleport to Falador.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a Falador.

text.en: Go to the White Knights' Castle, and head up to the 3rd floor of the western tower.
text.es: Ve al White Knights' Castle y sube a la 3ª planta de la torre oeste.

text.en: Talk to Sir Amik Varze.
text.es: Habla con Sir Amik Varze.

text.en: Talk to Sir Tiffy Cashien without any items equipped or in the inventory. He can be found in the Falador Park.
text.es: Habla con Sir Tiffy Cashien sin ningún objeto equipado ni en el inventario. Se le puede encontrar en el Falador Park.

text.en: Optionally, sit on the bench next to Sir Tiffy Cashien to complete the achievement: Tiffy Time.
text.es: Opcionalmente, siéntate en el banco junto a Sir Tiffy Cashien para completar el logro: Tiffy Time.

text.en: In this room there will be eleven statues when there should be twelve. The goal is to study the statues then, when the twelfth one is returned, pick the one that was originally missing.
text.es: En esta sala habrá once estatuas cuando debería haber doce. El objetivo es estudiar las estatuas y, cuando se devuelva la duodécima, elegir la que faltaba originalmente.

text.en: Easy method: look for the colour (bronze, silver, gold) of statue that only has 2 statues instead of 3, then note which weapon of that colour is missing out of the 4 possibilities (sword, halberd, great axe, or mace.)
text.es: Método fácil: busca el color (bronce, plata, oro) de la estatua que solo tiene 2 estatuas en vez de 3, luego anota qué arma de ese color falta entre las 4 posibilidades (espada, alabarda, hacha grande o maza).

text.en: Alternative method: the moment it shows 12 statues, take a screenshot. Then open the screenshot and compare which was missing and click it.
text.es: Método alternativo: en el momento en que se muestren las 12 estatuas, haz una captura de pantalla. Luego abre la captura y compara cuál faltaba y haz clic en ella.

text.en: Find the statue that wasn't there originally and touch it.
text.es: Encuentra la estatua que no estaba originalmente y tócala.

text.en: As a female character, kill Sir Leye.
text.es: Como personaje femenino, mata a Sir Leye.

text.en: If you have not visited the Makeover Mage before starting the quest, you can change your gender via the Customisation interface, under the Appearance tab.
text.es: Si no has visitado al Makeover Mage antes de empezar la misión, puedes cambiar tu género mediante la interfaz de Personalización, en la pestaña de Apariencia.

text.en: Low level players are encouraged to use Legacy Combat Mode as the life points range won't be as high, thus, quickly ending the fight.
text.es: Se recomienda a los jugadores de nivel bajo usar el Modo de Combate Legacy, ya que el rango de puntos de vida no será tan alto y, por tanto, el combate terminará rápidamente.

text.en: In this room, the chicken, grain, and the fox must all be transported to the other side of the bridge in a specific order.
text.es: En esta sala, la gallina, el grano y el zorro deben ser transportados todos al otro lado del puente en un orden específico.

text.en: Take the chicken across and put it down. In order to put down an object, open your equipment panel and click on the equipped object.
text.es: Lleva la gallina al otro lado y déjala en el suelo. Para dejar un objeto, abre tu panel de equipo y haz clic en el objeto equipado.

text.en: Take the fox across and put it down. Grab the chicken and return back.
text.es: Lleva el zorro al otro lado y déjalo en el suelo. Coge la gallina y vuelve.

text.en: Drop the chicken and take the Grain across.
text.es: Deja la gallina y lleva el Grano al otro lado.

text.en: Drop the grain and return back.
text.es: Deja el grano y vuelve.

text.en: Take the chicken across and drop it.
text.es: Lleva la gallina al otro lado y déjala.

text.en: Search the most south-western bookshelf for a knife.
text.es: Registra la estantería más al suroeste para encontrar un cuchillo.

text.en: Search all four of the most southern shelves with vials, take all of them.
text.es: Registra las cuatro estanterías más al sur con viales y cógelos todos.

text.en: Search the north-eastern middle-sized crate next to the chest for a tin.
text.es: Registra el cajón mediano al noreste junto al cofre para encontrar un estaño.

text.en: Search the four northern shelves for the remaining vials, take all of them.
text.es: Registra las cuatro estanterías del norte para encontrar los viales restantes y cógelos todos.

text.en: Pick up the metal spade on the table.
text.es: Recoge la metal spade sobre la mesa.

text.en: Use the metal spade on the bunsen burner in the room.
text.es: Usa la metal spade en el bunsen burner de la habitación.

text.en: Use the metal spade on the door.
text.es: Usa la metal spade en la puerta.

text.en: Use cupric sulphate on the door.
text.es: Usa cupric sulphate en la puerta.

text.en: Use a vial of liquid on the door.
text.es: Usa una vial of liquid en la puerta.

text.en: Pull on the spade to open the door.
text.es: Tira de la pala para abrir la puerta.

text.en: Use the gypsum on the tin.
text.es: Usa el gypsum en el tin.

text.en: Use a vial of liquid on the tin.
text.es: Usa una vial of liquid en el tin.

text.en: Use the tin on the key chained to the south-western wall.
text.es: Usa el estaño en la llave encadenada a la pared suroeste.

text.en: Use the cupric ore powder on the tin.
text.es: Usa el cupric ore powder en el tin.

text.en: Use the tin ore powder on the tin.
text.es: Usa el tin ore powder en el tin.

text.en: Heat the tin on the bunsen burner.
text.es: Calienta el tin en el bunsen burner.

text.en: Use a knife, bronze wire, or chisel on the tin.
text.es: Usa un knife, bronze wire, o chisel en el tin.

text.en: Walk-through the open first door.
text.es: Cruza la primera puerta abierta.

text.en: Unlock the door with the bronze key.
text.es: Desbloquea la puerta con la bronze key.

text.en: Talk to Sir Ren Itchood.
text.es: Habla con Sir Ren Itchood.

text.en: The first letter of each line he says is the answer to the door's lock.
text.es: La primera letra de cada línea que dice es la respuesta a la cerradura de la puerta.

text.en: Possible combinations are: BITE, FISH, LAST, MEAT, RAIN, or TIME.
text.es: Las combinaciones posibles son: BITE, FISH, LAST, MEAT, RAIN o TIME.

text.en: Talk to Ms. Hynn Terprett.
text.es: Habla con Ms. Hynn Terprett.

text.en: She will give you a riddle.
text.es: Ella te dará un acertijo.

rows.text: If you were sentenced to death, what would you rather choose, thrown into a lake of acid, burned over a fire, fed to wolves that haven't eaten in 30 days or being thrown off a castle turret?

I dropped four identical stones, into four identical buckets, each containing an identical amount of water. The first bucket was at 32 degrees Fahrenheit, the second was at 33 degrees, the third was at 34 and the fourth was at 35 degrees. Which bucket's stone dropped to the bottom of the bucket last?
A father is 4 times as old as his daughter. In 20 years he will be 2 times as old. How old is the daughter?

I estimate there to be one million inhabitants in the world of Gielinor; creatures and people both. What number would you get if you multiply the number of fingers on everything's left hand, to the nearest million?

The number of false statements here is one. The number of false statements here is two. The number of false statements here is three. The number of false statements here is four. How many false statements are there?

text.en: After you talk to him, do not move, stand there and do nothing until he talks again. Do not take the hourglass.
text.es: Después de hablar con él, no te muevas, quédate quieto y no hagas nada hasta que vuelva a hablar. No cojas el reloj de arena.

text.en: After all the puzzles are done, quest complete!
text.es: Una vez completados todos los rompecabezas, ¡misión completada!
